pub trait openai_core::ToolHandler: core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync
pub fn openai_core::ToolHandler::call(&self, arguments: serde_json::value::Value) -> openai_core::helpers::ToolFuture
impl<F, Fut> openai_core::helpers::ToolHandler for F where F: core::ops::function::Fn(serde_json::value::Value) -> Fut + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync, Fut: core::future::future::Future<Output = openai_core::error::Result<serde_json::value::Value>> + core::marker::Send + 'static
pub fn F::call(&self, arguments: serde_json::value::Value) -> openai_core::helpers::ToolFuture
pub fn openai_core::json_schema_for<T>() -> serde_json::value::Value where T: schemars::JsonSchema
pub fn openai_core::parse_json_payload<T>(payload: &str) -> openai_core::error::Result<T> where T: serde_core::de::DeserializeOwned
pub async fn openai_core::play_audio(input: impl core::convert::Into<openai_core::audio_helpers::AudioPlaybackInput>) -> openai_core::error::Result<()>
pub async fn openai_core::record_audio(options: openai_core::audio_helpers::RecordAudioOptions) -> openai_core::error::Result<openai_core::files::UploadSource>

pub type openai_core::FileLike = openai_core::files::UploadSource
pub type openai_core::OpenAIRealtimeWS = openai_core::websocket::OpenAIRealtimeWebSocket
pub type openai_core::PageStream<T> = core::pin::Pin<alloc::boxed::Box<(dyn futures_core::stream::Stream<Item = openai_core::error::Result<T>> + core::marker::Send)>>
pub type openai_core::RealtimeStreamMessage = openai_core::websocket::SocketStreamMessage<openai_core::websocket::RealtimeServerEvent>
pub type openai_core::ResponsesStreamMessage = openai_core::websocket::SocketStreamMessage<openai_core::websocket::ResponsesServerEvent>
pub type openai_core::Result<T, E> = core::result::Result<T, E>
